posts.author: issisorb (Isabella)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I think choosing which day of the week the calendar begins will benefit many people. I would prefer my calendar start on the day Sunday instead of Monday. I am acclimated to viewing a calendar in that fashion (with the day of the week beginning on a Sunday). Every time I am selecting a date of Monday, I am confused where it is and frustrated that it is the first option instead of the second.

What are you trying to achieve

Making the calendar view more user friendly. This is regarding the calendar pop-up for task dates. If some can change their calendars to begin on Sunday, it will help mentally date things. I know others don’t want weekends at all so I think making the calendar view completely editable will benefit all.
